name: Neo Laser Smart+
shortDescription: Android-powered smart ND:YAG laser with 13.3" touchscreen. Built-in handpiece cooling, 4 wavelengths, tattoo and pigment removal.
description: The NeoLaser Smart+ represents the most advanced smart laser technology: Android control, 13.3" touchscreen and built-in handpiece cooling. Intelligent software for precise and efficient treatments – from tattoo removal to carbon peeling.
metaTitle: NeoLaser Smart+ – Android ND:YAG Laser for Tattoo and Pigment Treatment
metaDescription: The NeoLaser Smart+ smart YAG laser with Android system, 13.3" touchscreen, built-in cooling. Tattoo and pigment removal, carbon peeling, skin rejuvenation.

videoDescription.headline: Neo Laser Smart+ – The smart laser that thinks for you
paragraphs: The NeoLaser Smart+ is not a conventional ND:YAG laser – it's an Android-powered smart device that makes treatments simpler and safer with intelligent software and built-in handpiece cooling.
The 13.3-inch touchscreen and intuitive interface provide maximum comfort, while the 4 wavelengths (1064 nm, 532 nm, 755 nm, 1320 nm) cover the complete treatment range.
The unique handpiece cooling instantly cools the skin, minimising pain and the risk of skin damage – for your clients' maximum comfort.

afterVideo.text: Have questions about the Neo Laser Smart+? We're happy to help!

afterFeatures.headline: Would you like to see the Neo Laser Smart+ in person?
afterFeatures.subtitle: Visit our showroom in Érd and try it out yourself!

final.headline: Interested in the Neo Laser Smart+?
final.subtitle: Request a free consultation and we'll help you decide if this is the best choice for you.

featureRows.headline: Why is the Neo Laser Smart+ the laser of the future?
featureRows.subtitle: Android intelligence, built-in cooling, 4 wavelengths

features.title: Android smart control – 13.3" touchscreen
features.description:
The NeoLaser Smart+ runs on an Android operating system, offering easy-to-use and customisable settings. The 13.3-inch colour touchscreen provides crystal-clear display and intuitive interface.

Advantages of smart control:

Android operating system – intuitive control
13.3" colour touchscreen LCD display
Intelligent software for precise settings
Customisable treatment protocols
features.highlight: The large display and Android system make treatments faster and more comfortable – even for beginners.

features.title: Built-in handpiece cooling – unique comfort feature
features.description:
The unique cooling mechanism built into the NeoLaser Smart+ handpiece instantly cools the skin, minimising pain and the risk of skin damage. This cutting-edge solution ensures maximum client comfort.

Advantages of built-in cooling:

Instant skin cooling during treatment
Minimal pain sensation
15W cooling power
Reduced risk of skin damage
features.highlight: The built-in handpiece cooling is a unique feature of the Neo Laser Smart+ – rarely seen in this category.

features.title: 4 wavelengths – prepared for every treatment
features.description:
The Neo Laser Smart+ operates on 4 different wavelengths, covering every need from tattoo removal to carbon peeling.

Wavelengths and applications:

1064 nm – dark pigments, tattoos (black, blue, grey)
532 nm – light pigments (red, brown, yellowish)
755 nm – pigment spots, freckles, sun spots treatment
1320 nm – carbon peeling, deep skin cleansing, pore tightening

features.title: Professional performance and reliability
features.description:
The Neo Laser Smart+ operates with 10–2000 mJ energy density and 1–10 Hz pulse frequency, achieving impressive results in every treatment area. The adjustable spot size (2–6 mm) enables precise targeting.

Technical parameters:

Energy density: 10–2000 mJ/cm²
Pulse frequency: 1–10 Hz
Spot size: 2–6 mm (adjustable)
Cooling power: 15W
features.highlight: The adjustable 2–6 mm spot size enables flexible switching between large areas and precise spot treatments.

training.headline: Device operator training – official certified course
training.intro: An official, certified training course registered in the FAR system is available for the Neo Laser Smart+. The curriculum was developed under the mentorship of an instructor with examination authority working in the healthcare sector, and is based on the professional materials of a Russian laser specialist physician.
items: Operating principles of Q-switched ND:YAG laser technology
Wavelengths and application areas (tattoo, pigment, carbon peeling)
Using the Android interface and intelligent software
Treatment protocols for different pigment types
Contraindications, skin type assessment and safe treatment
closingParagraphs: The training aims to enable participants to safely and legally apply the Neo Laser Smart+ for cosmetic and aesthetic treatments.
Upon completion of the training, an official FAR certificate is issued.

testimonials.name: Molnár Dóra
testimonials.text: The Neo Laser Smart+ Android system is fantastic – <mark>every setting is crystal clear on the 13.3-inch display, and the built-in cooling is my clients' favourite</mark>. Less pain, happier clients, and treatments are more comfortable for me too.

expertQuote.quote: The Neo Laser Smart+ is the pinnacle of intelligent laser technology: Android control, 4 wavelengths and built-in handpiece cooling. This device was made for the salons of the future.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

faq.question: What is the advantage of Android control over a traditional ND:YAG laser?
faq.answer: The Android operating system provides an intuitive interface, large touchscreen display and intelligent software. Customisable settings and visual treatment guides make work faster and more comfortable – even for beginners.

faq.question: How does the built-in handpiece cooling work?
faq.answer: The 15W cooling mechanism is built directly into the handpiece and instantly cools the skin during laser pulses. This minimises pain and the risk of skin damage – for maximum client comfort.

faq.question: What treatments can I perform with the 4 wavelengths?
faq.answer: 1064 nm for dark tattoos, 532 nm for light pigments, 755 nm for pigment spots and freckles, 1320 nm for carbon peeling. This covers everything from tattoo removal to skin rejuvenation.

faq.question: What is the spot size?
faq.answer: The adjustable spot size ranges from 2–6 mm, making it ideal for both precise spot treatments (e.g. permanent makeup correction) and larger area treatments (e.g. body tattoos).

faq.question: How quickly does the Neo Laser Smart+ pay for itself?
faq.answer: It typically pays for itself in 2-4 months with 3-5 clients per day. Tattoo removal costs 15,000-50,000 Ft per session, carbon peeling 15,000-30,000 Ft. Use our ROI calculator for exact figures!

faq.question: What training comes with the Neo Laser Smart+?
faq.answer: An official, FAR-registered certified device operator training is included FREE with the device purchase (worth 79,990 Ft). The training covers everything from using the Android interface to practical treatments.

faq.question: Is it possible to view the device before purchasing?
faq.answer: Yes! You can view and try the Neo Laser Smart+ in person at our showroom (Érd, Budai út 28.) by appointment.

whatsIncluded: Neo Laser Smart+ ND:YAG laser device
